maturityLevels.name: Prototype
maturityLevels.definition: Initial implementation exists, but behaviour/coverage is incomplete.

maturityLevels.name: Integrated
maturityLevels.definition: Integrated into simulation loop or public API with deterministic wiring.

maturityLevels.name: Hardened
maturityLevels.definition: Broad automated test coverage and stable behaviour across scenarios.
requiredEvidence: No open deterministic regressions in repo docs

maturityLevels.name: Validated
maturityLevels.definition: Hardened implementation plus explicit validation artifacts or benchmark/conformance evidence.
requiredEvidence: Validation docs, conformance fixtures, or benchmark reports

subsystems.name: Deterministic combat kernel
subsystems.notes: Historically marked COMPLETE in roadmap phases 1-3 and 26-29.

subsystems.name: Injury, medical, and survivability
subsystems.notes: Validated against external references in validation reports.

subsystems.name: Environment, hazards, and climate
subsystems.notes: Phase 10/29/60 capability set plus validation artifacts.

subsystems.name: AI, perception, and cognition
subsystems.notes: Integrated and tested; promoted to M4 once dedicated validation suite is published.

subsystems.name: Campaign/world simulation
subsystems.notes: Broad feature coverage with automated tests; external validation still partial.

subsystems.name: Bridge, replay, and integration surfaces
subsystems.notes: Conformance fixtures and bridge contract provide validation evidence.

subsystems.name: Tooling, benchmarks, and release checks
subsystems.notes: Performance baselines and release artifacts tracked in-repo.
